name: Tirzepatide
desc: Tirzepatide is a dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist of significant interest in metabolic and glycemic control research.

name: Semaglutide
desc: Semaglutide is a GLP-1 receptor agonist widely studied in metabolic research models.

name: Retatrutide
desc: Retatrutide is a triagonist peptide targeting GLP-1 GIP and glucagon receptors simultaneously.

name: Cagrilintide
desc: Cagrilintide is a long-acting amylin analogue studied in combination metabolic research protocols.

name: MOTS-c
desc: MOTS-c is a mitochondria-derived peptide studied for roles in metabolic homeostasis.

name: BPC-157
desc: BPC-157 is a pentadecapeptide extensively studied for tissue repair and gut healing.

name: TB-500
desc: TB-500 is a synthetic fragment of Thymosin Beta-4 researched for roles in actin regulation.

name: Tesamorelin
desc: Tesamorelin is a synthetic GHRH analogue studied in models of visceral adiposity.

name: BPC-157 / TB-500 Blend
desc: A research blend combining BPC-157 and TB-500.

name: CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin
desc: A synergistic blend of CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin studied in combination.

name: CJC-1295 No DAC
desc: CJC-1295 without DAC is a modified GHRH analogue with a shorter half-life.

name: Epithalon
desc: Epithalon is a tetrapeptide researched for effects on telomerase activity.

name: NAD+
desc: NAD+ is a critical coenzyme in cellular energy metabolism.

name: Bacteriostatic Water
desc: Sterile bacteriostatic water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol for reconstitution of lyophilized peptides.
